zh.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes於大約1610年出生在英國越可爾。他於1638年與Phebe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1661年登記服兵役。他去世於1676年3月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年67歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes于大约1610年出生在英国越可爾。他于1638年与Phebe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1661年登记服兵役。他去世于1676年3月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年67岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Sikes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sykes
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived near a small watercourse, especially one flowing through flat or marshy ground, or near a gully, dip, or hollow, from Middle English sik(e) ‘stream, ditch’ (Old Norse sík). Early and later examples of the surname occur in alternate singular and plural forms. It is the plural or -s form that has become the general usage as a surname, perhaps reinforced by the common practice in the post-medieval period of adding excrescent -s to topographic surnames with an original singular form. By the 16th century the name had spread by migration into the North Midlands. Elsewhere, only Norfolk seems to have produced this name independently, but its survival into the present day is uncertain. Compare Sitch , which once flourished in the West Midlands, and derives from an equivalent word, Middle English sich, of Old English origin.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes was born about 1610, in Yorkshire, England. He married Phebe in 1638, in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1661. He died on 11 March 1676, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes est né environ 1610, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Il a épousé Phebe en 1638, à Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1661. Il est décédé le 11 mars 1676, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes wurde um 1610 in Yorkshire, England geboren. Er hat 1638 in Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Phebe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1661 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. März 1676 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes è nato il circa 1610 nel Yorkshire, England. Lui sposato Phebe nel 1638, nel Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1661. Morì il 11 marzo 1676, nel Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Sikesは約1610年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた。1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクドールチェスターでPhebeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年に兵役登録をした。彼は1676年3月11日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで67歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Ba: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드

ko.Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드
ko.Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes(은)는 대략 1610년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 도르체스터에서 Phebe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1676년 3월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes nasceu aproximadamente 1610, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Phebe em 1638, em Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1661. Ele faleceu em 11 de março de 1676, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes родился около 1610 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Phebe в 1638 г. в местности дорчестир, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1661 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 марта 1676 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Sikes nació aproximadamente 1610, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Phebe en 1638, en Dorchester, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1661. Murió el 11 de marzo de 1676, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
